message:
test(fj-conformance): add 20 oracle tests for Squeeze primitive

Comprehensive coverage of lax.squeeze behavior:
- Automatic squeeze: removes all size-1 dims
- 2D/3D/4D squeeze at first/middle/last positions
- Multiple size-1 dims squeezed together
- All-ones shape squeezed to scalar
- Explicit dimension specification
- Partial squeeze (leave some size-1 dims)
- Scalar pass-through
- Float tensor support
- Edge cases: negative values, data preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
